_comment: Default-value reference for run_arch_spectral_ood.py — §9.1 architecture-aligned spectral OOD brittleness experiment (tied-weight trainable circulant spectral filter, theorem-B B3 analogue). Mirrors the ArchSpectralOODConfig dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §9.1 and thesis/theorem_b.txt Corollary 5 (cor:theoremB_ood). This is architecture-aligned support; NOT an exact theorem verification. Does not modify the canonical decoupled §9.1 script (run_arch_spectral_linear_stationary.py) or the tied-weight α-sweep v2 script.
